publishedAbstract: - Block and file storage cluster health check shows the following warning: ~~~ 1 pools have too few placement groups ~~~- `ceph status` is showing health in `HEALTH_WARN` state: ~~~ HEALTH_WARN 1 pools have too few placement groups [WRN] POOL_TOO_FEW_PGS: 1 pools have too few placement groups Pool ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem-data0 has 32 placement groups, should have 128 running ceph health detail command returns ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph cluster is reporting HEALTH_WARN with 'pools have too few placement groups'
